name: @clicks-protocol/cli
description: CLI for Clicks Protocol — autonomous DeFi yield for AI agents on Base. Check yield rates, simulate payment splits, manage agents, and withdraw earnings from the terminal.
author: Clicks Protocol <hello@clicksprotocol.xyz>

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  ✅ @clicks-protocol/cli installed
     Run clicks status to see live yield rates on Base.
     Run clicks doctor to check your setup.
     Docs: https://clicksprotocol.xyz/llms.txt
'
